name: Blocky Out
author: Poki
description: Blocky Out is a colorful puzzle game where your goal is to slide each block through its matching door to clear the board! Plan your moves carefully, as every slide counts, and solve tricky puzzles filled with clever mechanisms. Stuck? Use handy power-ups to give yourself a boost. Can you beat all the levels and master the art of sliding? How to play Blocky Out? Click and hold to slide. Who created Blocky Out? Blocky Out is created by Seal Unicorn Games. Play our other games on Poki : Misland , Hexellent , Fluffy Out , Dual Cat , Dual Cat: Max and Rusher Crusher ! How can I play Blocky Out for free? You can play Blocky Out for free on Poki. Can I play Blocky Out on mobile devices and desktop? Blocky Out can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
